post.description:
Authenticate via Telegram WebApp.

Flow:
  1. Validate initData signature (HMAC-SHA256)
  2. WARNING-4: Reject replayed initData (Redis SET NX, TTL 5 min)
  3. CRITICAL-4: Rate limit per telegram_id (5 req / 60s)
  4. Find or create User by telegram_id
  5. Flush DB (get user.id) -- commit deferred to get_db_session
  6. Create session in Redis (token, TTL 30 days)
  7. Return user + session_token
Logout -- delete session from Redis. (P-3)

Logout all sessions for the current user (W-06).

Invalidates every active session token. The current request
succeeds (user is already authenticated), but all subsequent
requests with any of the user's tokens will fail with 401.

get.description:
Return the authenticated user's profile.

User object is loaded by get_current_user dependency (read-only session).
No extra DB query needed.

patch.description:
Update the authenticated user's profile.

TD-029: get_current_user_write and Depends(get_db_session) share
the same session instance (FastAPI caches Depends within a request).
The user is already bound to the write session — no merge needed.

Only fields present in the request body are updated.

post.description:
Submit a master application.

Collects profile, experience, and documents from a 3-step form.
Creates a MasterProfile with status "pending". If a previous
application was rejected, updates the existing profile.

get.description:
Return the current master's profile.

Extracts display fields from the JSONB ``data`` column and
combines them with cached balance columns (frozen_cents,
available_cents). The ``status`` field reflects the master's
verification status (pending / verified / rejected).

F7: Response now includes payout field (None until configured).
CR-01: Response now includes withdrawal limits from settings.

patch.description:
Update master's payout details (bank, PayPal, etc.).

Stored in MasterProfile.data.payout. Snapshotted into each
Withdrawal at creation time (A+C pattern).

get.description: List practices owned by the current master (newest first).

post.description:
Verify a pending master application.

Updates profile status to 'verified' and promotes user role to MASTER.

Reject a pending master application.

Stores rejection reason. User can reapply later.

get.description: Return platform-wide statistics for admin dashboard.
List all users with optional filters and pagination.
List all masters with optional status filter.
Shortcut: list master applications awaiting verification.
Shortcut: list rejected master applications.

Fetch a single master by user_id.

Used by admin review screen as fallback when router state is unavailable
(direct URL navigation, page refresh). Returns 404 if user has no
MasterProfile.
List all reports with optional filters and pagination.

Fetch a single report by id.

Used by admin detail screen as fallback when router state is unavailable
(direct URL navigation, page refresh). Returns 404 if not found.

post.description: Resolve a pending report.
Dismiss a pending report.
Approve a pending withdrawal -- debit frozen, credit company fee.
Reject a pending withdrawal -- unfreeze funds back to available.

get.description: List all withdrawals (admin view, optional status filter).

post.description:
Create a company promo code (platform-wide, marketing budget).

Company promos: the platform pays for the discount.
Code is automatically uppercased. Discount must be in the allowed list.

get.description:
List all promos (company + master, admin view).

Optional filters: type (company|master), is_active (true|false).

patch.description:
Deactivate a company promo (soft delete).

Only company promos can be deactivated by admin. Master promos
are managed by their owners.

get.description:
Run all data consistency semaphores and return results.

21 checks across 5 categories: COUNT=COUNT, SUM=0,
COMPUTED=ACTUAL, ORPHAN DETECTION, BUSINESS INVARIANTS.

post.description:
Reload notification templates from YAML files.

Clears the in-memory cache and re-reads all template files.
Use after editing YAML templates without restarting the server.

schema.title: Response Reload Templates Endpoint Api V1 Admin Templates Reload Post

post.description: Create a new report. Returns existing report (200) if duplicate.

schema.title: Response Create Report Endpoint Api V1 Reports Post

get.description: List current user's reports with pagination.

List practices in the public feed.

Only scheduled and live practices are shown.
Supports filters, sorting, and pagination.

post.description: Create a new practice (verified master only).

get.description:
Get a practice by id.

Draft/deleted practices are visible only to the owner master.

delete.description:
Soft-delete a draft practice (owner master only).

Sets status=deleted. Only works on drafts. Published practices
must be cancelled via POST /{id}/cancel (Phase 6.5).

post.description:
Cancel a practice and refund all participants (owner master only).

100% refund to every active booking. Waitlist entries cleared.
Only works on scheduled/live practices. This is the only way
to transition a practice to cancelled status.

Book the current user into a practice.

Phase 6.7: optional promo_code in body for discount.

get.description:
List bookings for the current user.

Returns paginated list with embedded PracticeSummary so the
frontend can render cards without additional API calls.

Optional ``status`` filter (e.g. ``?status=confirmed``).

Get a single booking with full practice details.

Access control:
  - Booking owner (deep link from notification).
  - Master of the practice (attendance dashboard).

Returns 404 for non-existent or unauthorized bookings (P-08).

post.description: Check in to a practice (sets joined_at).
Check out from a practice (sets left_at).
Join the waitlist for a full practice.

get.description:
List waitlist entries for the current user.

Returns paginated list with embedded PracticeSummary so the
frontend can render cards without additional API calls.

Optional ``status`` filter (e.g. ``?status=waiting``).

delete.description: Leave the waitlist or decline a spot offer.

post.description:
Confirm a waitlist spot -- creates a booking.

Returns 201 + booking on success.
Returns 400 (as JSONResponse, NOT exception) when expired or spot
taken. JSONResponse lets get_db_session commit the status changes
(EXPIRED / back to WAITING) instead of rolling them back.
Finalize a practice -- resolve attendance + financial settlement.

get.description: Get attendance list for a practice (master-only).

post.description:
Create a Stripe Checkout Session for balance top-up.

Returns a checkout URL that the frontend should redirect to.

Receive and process Stripe webhook events.

1. Read raw body (required for signature verification).
2. Verify signature using Stripe-Signature header.
3. Dispatch to event-specific handler.
4. Return 200 on success, 500 on transient failure (M-03).

Stripe retries on 5xx with exponential backoff (up to 3 days).
Handlers are idempotent, so retries are safe.

Purchase a practice -- creates Booking + Purchase.

Optional promo_code in request body to apply a discount.
For free practices: paid_cents=0, ledger entries with amount=0.
For paid practices: checks balance, deducts from user, freezes at master.

Returns full purchase details including financial info.

Preview purchase pricing with optional promo code.

Read-only endpoint -- no booking, no purchase, no ledger entries.
Shows what the user would pay with/without a promo code.

get.description:
List purchases for the current user.

Returns paginated list with embedded PracticeSummary so the
frontend can render purchase history cards.

Optional ``status`` filter (e.g. ``?status=completed``).

post.description:
Create a withdrawal request.

Freezes the requested amount from available balance.
Requires payout details to be configured first.

get.description: List my withdrawal requests (newest first, paginated).

post.description:
Create a master promo code.

Master promos: the master absorbs the discount from their revenue.
Code is automatically uppercased. Discount must be in the allowed list.

get.description: List promo codes created by the current master (newest first).

patch.description:
Deactivate (soft-delete) a master promo code.

Existing purchases with this promo keep their promo_id FK.
The promo simply stops being usable for new purchases.

post.description:
Create or update a pre-practice check-in.

Returns 200 for both create and update (upsert semantics).

get.description: List the current user's check-ins with optional filters.

post.description:
Create or update a post-practice feedback.

Returns 200 for both create and update (upsert semantics).

get.description: List the current user's feedbacks with optional filters.

post.description: Create a new personal diary entry.

get.description: List the current user's diary entries with optional filters.
Get a single diary entry owned by the current user.

patch.description:
Update a diary entry owned by the current user.

Only provided fields are updated. Use clear_* flags to set
nullable fields (mood, title, practice_id) to null.

delete.description:
Delete a diary entry owned by the current user.

Hard delete -- personal data is permanently removed.

get.description:
Get aggregated anonymous insights for a completed practice.

Master-only: returns mood distribution, rating distribution,
participant count, and feedback comments count.
No individual user data is exposed.

Return an AI-generated summary for a practice.

Phase 9.1: always returns a static placeholder (is_mock=True).
Only the practice owner (master) can request a summary.
Non-owners receive 404 to avoid revealing resource existence (P-08).
Root endpoint -- API info.
Health check -- DB and Redis connectivity.
Readiness probe -- returns 503 if degraded (TD-003).

AISummaryResponse.title: AISummaryResponse
AISummaryResponse.description:
GET /api/v1/practices/{id}/ai-summary -- response body.

practice_id: The practice this summary belongs to.
summary:     Generated text. Placeholder in Phase 9.1.
is_mock:     True when returned by MockAIService.
generated_at: When the summary was produced.

AdminMasterListItem.title: AdminMasterListItem
AdminMasterListItem.description:
Single item in admin masters list -- user data + master status.

CR-01: role narrowed from str to UserRole for type safety.

AdminWithdrawalResponse.description: Single withdrawal record for admin view.

Used by GET /api/v1/bookings/{id}. Returns the complete
PracticeResponse so the frontend can render a full detail page

CreateBookingRequest.title: CreateBookingRequest
CreateBookingRequest.description:
POST /api/v1/bookings -- request body.

Phase 6.7: optional promo_code for discount.
Existing clients that omit promo_code continue to work unchanged.

discount_percent.title: Discount Percent
discount_percent.description: Discount percentage (must be in allowed list).

valid_from.title: Valid From
valid_from.description: Start of validity window (UTC). Defaults to current time when omitted.

valid_until.title: Valid Until
valid_until.description: End of validity window (null = no expiry).

first_purchase_only.title: First Purchase Only
first_purchase_only.description: If true, only works for user's first purchase.

CreateCompanyPromoRequest.title: CreateCompanyPromoRequest
CreateCompanyPromoRequest.description:
POST /api/v1/admin/promos -- create a company promo code.

Company promos: company pays for the discount from marketing budget.
type=company and master_id=None are set automatically by the service.
practice_id is always None (company promos are platform-wide).

discount_percent.title: Discount Percent
discount_percent.description: Discount percentage (must be in allowed list).

practice_id.title: Practice Id
practice_id.description: Limit promo to a specific practice (null = all).

valid_from.title: Valid From
valid_from.description: Start of validity window (UTC). Defaults to current time when omitted.

valid_until.title: Valid Until
valid_until.description: End of validity window (null = no expiry).

first_purchase_only.title: First Purchase Only
first_purchase_only.description: If true, only works for user's first purchase.

CreateMasterPromoRequest.title: CreateMasterPromoRequest
CreateMasterPromoRequest.description:
POST /api/v1/masters/me/promos -- create a master promo code.

Master promos: master absorbs the discount from their revenue.
type and master_id are set automatically by the service layer.

CreateWithdrawalRequest.title: CreateWithdrawalRequest
CreateWithdrawalRequest.description:
POST /api/v1/masters/me/withdraw -- request body.

amount_cents is the total withdrawal amount (fee deducted from it).
Minimum enforced in service against settings.min_withdrawal_cents.

MoodDistribution.description: Check-in mood counts for a practice.

PracticeInsightsResponse.title: PracticeInsightsResponse
PracticeInsightsResponse.description:
GET /api/v1/practices/{id}/insights -- aggregated data.

All data is anonymous: no user IDs, names, or comment texts.
Only numeric distributions and counts.

PracticeResponse.title: PracticeResponse
PracticeResponse.description: Practice representation returned by all endpoints.

PracticeSummary.title: PracticeSummary
PracticeSummary.description:
Compact practice representation for embedding in related responses.

Used inside BookingWithPracticeResponse, WaitlistWithPracticeResponse,
and PurchaseWithPracticeResponse to give the frontend enough data
for list-view cards without a separate GET /practices/{id} call.

CR-01: timezone added -- Practice ORM has timezone as NOT NULL,
model_validate() picks it up automatically via from_attributes.
Without this field, frontend fell back to Europe/Berlin for all
practices regardless of actual timezone.

promo_code.title: Promo Code
promo_code.description: Optional promo code to preview pricing.

PurchaseRequest.title: PurchaseRequest

POST /api/v1/practices/{id}/purchase -- optional request body.

promo_code is optional. If omitted or null, no promo is applied.
Existing clients that send no body continue to work (all fields optional).

PurchaseResponse.title: PurchaseResponse
PurchaseResponse.description:
Purchase details returned to client.

Phase 6.7: added amount_cents, discount_cents, promo_id.
Invariant: paid_cents = amount_cents - discount_cents.

PurchaseWithPracticeResponse.title: PurchaseWithPracticeResponse
PurchaseWithPracticeResponse.description:
Purchase with lightweight practice summary for list views.

Used by GET /api/v1/purchases/me. Gives the frontend enough data
for purchase history rendering (title, time, amount, status).

RatingDistribution.title: RatingDistribution
RatingDistribution.description: Feedback rating counts for a practice.

ReportResponse.title: ReportResponse
ReportResponse.description: Single report -- returned to both user and admin.

SemaphoreResult.title: SemaphoreResult
SemaphoreResult.description:
Single semaphore check result.

name:        machine-readable identifier (e.g. "1.1_bookings_eq_purchases").
category:    one of 5 categories from VELO-Data-Consistency-Semaphores.md.
status:      OK if expected == actual, ALERT otherwise.
expected:    what the check expects (human-readable string or number).
actual:      what was found.
details:     optional dict with extra context (e.g. mismatched IDs).
criticality: how severe an ALERT is.

init_data.title: Init Data
init_data.description: Raw initData string from Telegram WebApp

amount_cents.title: Amount Cents
amount_cents.description: Amount to top up in EUR cents.

UpdateDiaryEntryRequest.title: UpdateDiaryEntryRequest
UpdateDiaryEntryRequest.description:
PATCH /api/v1/diary/{id} body.

All fields optional. Only provided fields are updated.

UpdatePracticeRequest.title: UpdatePracticeRequest
UpdatePracticeRequest.description:
PATCH /api/v1/practices/{id} -- request body.

All fields optional. Only provided fields are updated.
P-02: NOT NULL fields typed as X | None so that "not sent" works
with exclude_unset. Service layer guards against explicit null.

UpdateReportRequest.title: UpdateReportRequest
UpdateReportRequest.description: User edits their own pending report (reason only).

UserRole.title: UserRole
UserRole.description:
User roles in the platform.

USER:   default role, can browse and book practices.
MASTER: verified facilitator, can create and host practices.
ADMIN:  platform operator, can manage users and content.

UserUpdate.title: UserUpdate
UserUpdate.description:
PATCH /api/v1/users/me — updatable profile fields.

All fields are optional. Only provided fields are updated.
avatar_url is excluded — managed by Telegram (future: Bot API).

Empty strings are rejected (min_length=1). To clear a field,
send null explicitly: {"last_name": null}.

timezone and language are NOT NULL in DB — sending null for them
is rejected by _reject_null_for_required_fields (mode="before").

notes.title: Notes
notes.description: Optional admin notes about verification decision
